abstract.t: This document requests the allocation of the IPv4 special-purpose address 192.0.0.11/32 to enable IPv4 communication over IPv6-only networks without subnets, ARP, tunneling, or translation. Hosts configured with this address as their IPv4 default gateway resolve the next-hop link-layer address from the IPv6 neighbor cache instead of via ARP. IPv4 packets are carried natively, end-to-end.
